template:
set -euo pipefail
shopt -s nullglob
collect_output_from_globs() { dest="$1"; shift; local pattern candidate matches=(); local -a inputs=(); for pattern in "$@"; do matches=( $pattern ); for candidate in "${matches[@]}"; do if [ -f "$candidate" ]; then inputs+=( "$candidate" ); fi; done; done; if [ "${#inputs[@]}" -eq 0 ]; then printf 'missing expected SortMeRNA output for %s\n' "$dest" >&2; return 1; fi; { for candidate in "${inputs[@]}"; do case "$candidate" in *.gz) gzip -cd -- "$candidate" ;; *) cat -- "$candidate" ;; esac; done; } | gzip -c > "$dest"; }
rm -rf 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/kvdb' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out'
mkdir -p 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/idx' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/kvdb' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out'
mkdir -p "$(dirname 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_filtered.fastq.gz')" "$(dirname 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/removed_rrna.fastq.gz')" "$(dirname 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_report.tsv')" "$(dirname 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_report.json')"
rm -f 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_filtered.fastq.gz' '' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/removed_rrna.fastq.gz' '' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_report.tsv' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_report.json'
'sortmerna' '--ref' 'assets/reference/rrna/references/sortmerna_common_rrna_reference.fasta' '--reads' 'assets/toy/core-v1/fastq/reads_1.fastq' '--workdir' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/' '--idx-dir' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/idx' '--kvdb' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/kvdb' '--readb' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb' '--threads' '4' '--fastx' '--zip-out' 'yes'
collect_output_from_globs 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_filtered.fastq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/other*.fastq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/other*.fq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/other*.fastq' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/other*.fq' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/fwd_*.fastq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/fwd_*.fq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/fwd_*.fastq' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/fwd_*.fq'
collect_output_from_globs 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/removed_rrna.fastq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/aligned*.fastq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/aligned*.fq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/aligned*.fastq' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/aligned*.fq' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/aligned_fwd_*.fastq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/aligned_fwd_*.fq.gz' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/aligned_fwd_*.fastq' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/readb/aligned_fwd_*.fq'
if [ -f 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/aligned.log' ]; then cp -- 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/sortmerna_workdir/out/aligned.log' 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_report.tsv'; else : > 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_report.tsv'; fi
printf '{}\n' > 'benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/fastq.deplete_rrna/rrna_report.json'
